name: l2_static_airframe_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeRunMatrix records compact static-airframe L2 run summaries for four drone presets.
note: Reference surface for the static-airframe A4MC L2 run summary packet.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge builds bounded L2 force/moment requests and extracts compact run results.
note: Reference surface for the static-airframe A4MC L2 run summary packet.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies static-airframe masks and force/moment request specs for each preset.
note: Reference surface for the static-airframe A4MC L2 run summary packet.

name: test_l2_runtime_fixture
value: The test AeroWindApi fixture verifies the reflected L2 run result shape without requiring a live A4MC install.
note: Reference surface for the static-airframe A4MC L2 run summary packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live L2 wind-tunnel force/moment validation.

name: static_run_matrix
value: Static-airframe L2 run matrix records compact force/moment summaries only; raw CFD atlas output stays disabled and missing A4MC runtime remains unavailable.
note: The packet captures reflected test-runtime summaries while production calls still require the Aerodynamics4MC mod to be loaded.
